author: PoutyJinx
OpenAI
description: SIN Corp Server Hub: manage game server info, workshop links, notes, passwords, and restart pings with prefix and slash commands.
install_msg: Thanks for installing SIN Server Hub. Load it with `[p]load sinserverhub`, then enable slash commands with `[p]slash enablecog sinserverhub` and `[p]slash sync`.
short: SIN Corp game server information board.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores server information configured by moderators per Discord server. It does not store personal user data.
